induction_input: The cake the chef baked vanished.
The letter the student wrote arrived.
The bridge the engineer built collapsed.
The song the musician composed spread.
The book the author signed sold.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences where a subject with an embedded relative clause (noun + the + agent + verb) is followed by a simple intransitive verb.
induced_prompt: Write sentences where a subject with an embedded relative clause (noun + the + agent + verb) is followed by a simple intransitive verb.
l2_sentences: The cat the neighbor feeds sleeps.
The book the scholar wrote disappeared.
The bridge the engineers built collapsed.
The song the children sang echoed.
The painting the artist created survived.
l1_sentences: The cake the chef baked vanished.
